title: Cox's Bazar Stadium

infobox.value: is a football stadium situated by the south side of [Cox's Bazar Medical College Hospital](/w/index.php?title=Cox%27s_Bazar_Medical_College_Hospital&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cox's Bazar Medical College Hospital (page does not exist)") and east side of [Cox's Bazar district council](/wiki/Cox%27s_Bazar_District "Cox's Bazar District").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

["ফুটবলে একঝাঁক সম্ভাবনাময় তরুণ"](https://www.kalerkantho.com/feature/khalar-ghor/2015/12/03/297679) [A bunch of promising youngsters in football]. *Kaler Kantho* (in Bengali). 3 December 2015. [Archived](https://ghostarchive.org/archive/hJ8VM) from the original on 26 February 2024. Retrieved 26 February 2024.

["খেলার মাঠে সংঘর্ষে আহত ১০, বিদেশী খেলোয়াড় লাঞ্ছিত"](https://web.archive.org/web/20140504205012/http://www.timesworld24.com/news-details.php?id=18878). Archived from [the original](http://www.timesworld24.com/news-details.php?id=18878) on 2014-05-04. Retrieved 2013-06-27.

["কক্সবাজারে লাঞ্চিত জাতীয়-বিদেশী ফুটবলার ও রেফারি... ই নিউজ"](http://www.enewsbd24.com/common_body/details_innerpage.php?Id=15883&pages=p6&box=605). [Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [21°26′22.49″N 91°58′35.02″E﻿ / ﻿21.4395806°N 91.9763944°E﻿ / 21.4395806; 91.9763944](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Cox%27s_Bazar_Stadium&params=21_26_22.49_N_91_58_35.02_E_type:landmark)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football stadium in Cox's Bazar, Bangladesh

For other uses, see [Cox's Bazar (disambiguation)](/wiki/Cox%27s_Bazar_(disambiguation) "Cox's Bazar (disambiguation)").

Cox's Bazar Stadium

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Map Interactive map of Cox's Bazar Stadium | |
| Location | District council Road, [Cox's Bazar](/wiki/Cox%27s_Bazar "Cox's Bazar"), [Bangladesh](/wiki/Bangladesh "Bangladesh") |
| Coordinates | [21°26′22.49″N 91°58′35.02″E﻿ / ﻿21.4395806°N 91.9763944°E﻿ / 21.4395806; 91.9763944](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Cox%27s_Bazar_Stadium&params=21_26_22.49_N_91_58_35.02_E_type:landmark) |
| Owner | [National Sports Council](/wiki/National_Sports_Council "National Sports Council")[[2]](#cite_note-nsc-2) |
| Operator | National Sports Council[[2]](#cite_note-nsc-2) |
| Capacity | 5,000 |
| Field size | 115 × 80 m (377 × 262 ft) |
| Field shape | Rectangular |
| Construction | |
| Opened | 1957[[1]](#cite_note-1) |
| Tenants | |
| * [Bangladesh national football team](/wiki/Bangladesh_national_football_team "Bangladesh national football team") * Comilla Football Team | |

**Cox's Bazar Stadium**, also known as **Bir Shrestha Ruhul Amin Stadium** is a football stadium situated by the south side of [Cox's Bazar Medical College Hospital](/w/index.php?title=Cox%27s_Bazar_Medical_College_Hospital&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cox's Bazar Medical College Hospital (page does not exist)") and east side of [Cox's Bazar district council](/wiki/Cox%27s_Bazar_District "Cox's Bazar District").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)
